calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-13-2016 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-13-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Gemma O'Keeffe for and with David Keeler.

Ms. O'Keeffe presented copies of consents just filed. The Court stated that it now has consents from everyone, that there have been no objections, that it will grant the petition and will require a bond in the amount of $1,907,000.00. The Petition for Letters of Administration was granted and the order signed in open court.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputies Lopes & Santiago. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-29-2015 Continued To May-13-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
